title: pelargonium × variifolium
intro: Pelargonium × variifolium, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium Roseum, is a hybrid plant species within the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its distinctive rose-scented leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × variifolium include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to reap its medicinal and therapeutic benefits.
